en.extract:
The Papuan parrotfinch (Erythrura papuana) is a common species of estrildid finch found in New Guinea. It has an estimated global extent of occurrence of 50,000 to 100,000 km2. There is some doubt as to whether this species and the blue-faced parrotfinch (E. trichroa) are conspecific.
It is found in subtropical and tropical montane moist forest. The IUCN has classified the species as being of least concern.


References


External links
Species factsheet - BirdLife International

The '''Papuan parrotfinch''' ('''''Erythrura papuana''''') is a common species of [[estrildid finch]] found in [[New Guinea]]. It has an estimated global extent of occurrence of 50,000 to 100,000 km<sup>2</sup>. There is some doubt as to whether this species and the blue-faced parrotfinch (''E. trichroa'') are conspecific.<ref>{{Cite journal|last1=DeCicco|first1=Lucas H.|last2=Benz|first2=Brett W.|last3=DeRaad|first3=Devon A.|last4=Hime|first4=Paul M.|last5=Moyle|first5=Robert G.|date=2020-09-21|title=New Guinea Erythrura parrotfinches: one species or two?|journal=Bulletin of the British Ornithologists' Club|volume=140|issue=3|doi=10.25226/bboc.v140i3.2020.a8|s2cid=221823964|issn=0007-1595|doi-access=free}}</ref>

It is found in subtropical and tropical montane moist forest. The [[IUCN]] has classified the species as being of [[least concern]].

zh.extract:
大蓝脸鹦雀（学名：Erythrura papuana）是印度尼西亚巴布亚省和巴布亚新几内亚的一种常见梅花雀。其全球分布范围约有50,000至100,000平方千米。
大蓝脸鹦雀分布于亚热带和热带的湿润山地林。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。


参考文献
